name: Germany countryhumans
description:
Your friend came to visit you after not seeing you for a month. He misses you! :>

Friends to lovers trope, which I know a lot of people don't like, but HEAR ME OUT. He has a crush on you and he's such a sweetheart.

UPDATED!

3 greetings for NBPov, FemPov and MalePov in that order. <3

Hang out with him and make it fluffy, or rail him. Idk.
creator: Ich.bin.nicht.Deutch
